message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Use of native SidecarContainers (init container with mission (#1129)

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-3366-use-of-native-sidecarcontainers-init-container-with-restartpo",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Use of native SidecarContainers (init container with `restartPolicy: Always`) results in pod status getting stuck on `Init`",
+    "description": "Use of native SidecarContainers (init container with `restartPolicy: Always`) results in pod status getting stuck on `Init`. This issue affects 29+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-rollouts troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-rollouts deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nK8s 1.29 enables the `SidecarContainers` feature gate by default (more info on the native sidecars here https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/sidecar-containers/)\nThese are defined as `initContainers` with the `restartPolicy` set to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Use of native SidecarContainers (init container with…",
+        "description": "Is this fixed in 1.8.0? I see the [commit](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/commit/6c873a95ec34e141243cc5e3846c69c9ce1c42d3) that has the fix in the 1.8.0 code, but it looks like a subsequent [commit](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/commit/bfef7f0d2bb71b085398c35ec95c1b2aacd07187) deletes this code? I am still seeing this behavior in 1.8.0.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Use of native SidecarContainers (init container… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Is this fixed in 1.8.0? I see the [commit](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/commit/6c873a95ec34e141243cc5e3846c69c9ce1c42d3) that has the fix in the 1.8.0 code, but it looks like a subsequent [commit](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/commit/bfef7f0d2bb71b085398c35ec95c1b2aacd07187) deletes this code? I am still seeing this behavior in 1.8.0.",

+    }
+  },
